arts.sum: Peterborough star set for history-making FA Cup fairytale against father Ashley Young

arts.ttl: 'You speak to lots of people' - Graham Potter explains why he took West Ham United job after Everton links
arts.sum: Graham Potter has signed a two-and-a-half-year contract at West Ham United

arts.ttl: Snow puts Everton, P'borough clash in doubt
arts.sum: Poor weather has put Everton's FA Cup third-round match against Peterborough on Thursday at Goodison Park in doubt.

arts.ttl: “I conveyed our fans’ complaints” – Jose Mourinho in his own Fenerbahçe strife as Everton claims add drama
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has found himself in troubled waters at Fenerbahce, as reports in England suggest he could be on his way to Everton. arts.ttl: Paul Merson warns Everton why they should be careful about appointing Jose Mourinho
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho is being linked with a shock return to the Premier League with Everton, however, Paul Merson has warned them about making such an...

arts.ttl: Merson: Jose to Everton? He's no different to Dyche!
arts.sum: I'm a big fan of Jose Mourinho. He’s been an amazing manager over the years, one of the all-time greats but I don't see how this Everton job ticks the box.

arts.ttl: Player ‘pushing’ to leave Everton – Wants Premier League escape, trying to ‘force’ transfer
arts.sum: Everton’s demands continue to push Torino away from a deal for striker Beto, despite the striker wanting the move and making that clear. That’s according to Tuttosport, relayed by Tuttomercatoweb, who report Everton are remaining firm in their demands to the Italian club. arts.ttl: Everton making 'every effort' for cup tie to go ahead
arts.sum: Everton are making "every effort" to ensure their FA Cup third-round tie against Peterborough goes ahead despite icy conditions in Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Safety meeting scheduled to assess conditions ahead of FA Cup tie at Everton
arts.sum: The Premier League club will meet with relevant authorities at 1pm to evaluate the weather and travel conditions.

arts.ttl: Everton to hold safety meeting before Peterborough FA Cup clash after new weather warning
arts.sum: Everton are scheduled to welcome Peterborough United to Goodison Park tonight for a FA Cup third-round tie
